segments.text: When Israel came out of Egypt, Jacob from a people of foreign tongue
Judah became God's sanctuary, Israel his dominion
The sea looked and fled, the Jordan turned back
the mountains leaped like rams, the hills like lambs
Why was it, sea, that you fled? Why, Jordan, did you turn back?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Why, mountains, did you leap like rams, you hills, like lambs?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Tremble, earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: who turned the rock into a pool, the hard rock into springs of water
